label: 1537 CE
era_summary: Year 1537 (MDXXXVII) was a common year starting on Monday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1537: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Turkey-emperor, Papal states, 1537-38; Turkey, Algiers-Venice, 1537-39. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
